trans-unit.source: Expected crash dump file '{0}' could not be found, all files matching the '*.dmp' pattern will be copied to the result folder
trans-unit.target: 找不到預期的損毀傾印檔案 '{0}'，符合 '*.dmp' 模式的所有檔案都將複製到結果資料夾

trans-unit.source: Expected crash report file '{0}' could not be found, all files matching the '{1}' pattern will be copied to the result folder
trans-unit.target: 找不到預期的損毀報告檔案 '{0}'，符合 '{1}' 模式的所有檔案都將複製到結果資料夾

trans-unit.source: The testhost process crash dump file
trans-unit.target: testhost 處理常式損毀傾印檔案

trans-unit.source: Crash dump file
trans-unit.target: 損毀傾印檔案

trans-unit.source: [net6.0+ only] Produce crash dump files when the test execution process crashes unexpectedly
trans-unit.target: [net6.0+ only] 測試執行流程意外損毀時會產生損毀傾印檔案

trans-unit.source: Crash dump
trans-unit.target: 損毀傾印

trans-unit.source: Specify the name of the dump file
trans-unit.target: 指定傾印檔案的名稱

trans-unit.source: Environment variable '{0}' should have been set to '{1}' but value is '{2}'
trans-unit.target: 環境變數 '{0}' 應該設定為 '{1}' 但值為 '{2}'

trans-unit.source: Crash dump feature is only available in .NET (Core)
trans-unit.target: 只有 .NET (Core) 才可使用損毀傾印功能

trans-unit.source: [net6.0+ only] Generate a dump file if the test process crashes
trans-unit.target: [net6.0+ only] 如果測試流程損毀，則產生傾印檔案

trans-unit.source: Test host process with PID '{0}' crashed, but the expected diagnostic artifact(s) were not produced
trans-unit.target: PID '{0}' 的測試主機處理序已損毀，但未產生預期的診斷成品

trans-unit.source: Test host process with PID '{0}' crashed, a dump file and crash report were generated
trans-unit.target: PID '{0}' 的測試主機處理程序損毀，已產生傾印檔案和損毀報告

trans-unit.source: Test host process with PID '{0}' crashed, a dump file was generated
trans-unit.target: PID '{0}' 損毀的測試主機處理常式，已產生傾印檔案

trans-unit.source: Test host process with PID '{0}' crashed, a crash report was generated
trans-unit.target: PID '{0}' 損毀的測試主機處理常式，已產生損毀報告

trans-unit.source: Specify the type of the dump. Valid values are 'Mini', 'Heap', 'Triage' or 'Full'. Default type is 'Full'. For more information visit https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/core/diagnostics/collect-dumps-crash#types-of-mini-dumps
trans-unit.target: 指定傾印的類型。 有效值為 'Mini'、'Heap'、'Triage' 或 'Full'。預設類型為 'Full'。 如需詳細資訊，請瀏覽 https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/core/diagnostics/collect-dumps-crash#types-of-mini-dumps

trans-unit.source: '{0}' is not a valid dump type. Valid options are 'Mini', 'Heap', 'Triage' and 'Full'
trans-unit.target: '{0}' 不是有效的傾印類型。有效的選項為 'Mini'、'Heap'、'Triage' 和 'Full'

trans-unit.source: '--crashdump-type' expects a single dump type as argument (e.g. '--crashdump-type Heap')
trans-unit.target: '--crashdump-type' 需要單一傾印類型做為引數 (例如 '--crashdump-type Heap')

trans-unit.source: The testhost process crash report file
trans-unit.target: testhost 處理常式損毀報告檔案

trans-unit.source: Crash report file
trans-unit.target: 損毀報告檔案

trans-unit.source: '--crash-report' is not supported on Windows because the .NET runtime ignores the underlying 'DOTNET_EnableCrashReport' and 'DOTNET_EnableCrashReportOnly' environment variables on this platform. See https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/issues/80191. Use '--crashdump' to generate a crash dump file instead.
trans-unit.target: '--crash-report' 在 Windows 上不支援，因為 .NET 執行階段會忽略此平台上的底層 'DOTNET_EnableCrashReport' 和 'DOTNET_EnableCrashReportOnly' 環境變數。請參閱 https://github.com/dotnet/runtime/issues/80191。請改用 '--crashdump' 來產生損毀傾印檔案。

trans-unit.source: [Linux/macOS only] Generate a JSON crash report when the test process crashes. Combine with '--crashdump' to also generate a dump file. Requires .NET 7+ when used alone; .NET 6+ when combined with '--crashdump'. This runtime requirement is not enforced by the tool: on unsupported runtimes no crash report will be emitted. Not supported on Windows due to a .NET runtime limitation (dotnet/runtime#80191).
trans-unit.target: [僅限 Linux/macOS] 當測試處理序損毀時，產生 JSON 損毀報告。將此選項與 '--crashdump' 一起使用，也可產生傾印檔案。單獨使用時需要 .NET 7 以上版本；與 '--crashdump' 搭配使用時需要 .NET 6 以上版本。工具不會強制檢查此執行階段需求: 在不支援的執行階段上，不會輸出損毀報告。由於 .NET 執行階段的限制 (dotnet/runtime#80191)，Windows 不支援此功能。

trans-unit.source: You specified one or more crash dump parameters but did not enable crash dumps. Add --crashdump or --crash-report to the command line.
trans-unit.target: You specified one or more crash dump parameters but did not enable crash dumps. Add --crashdump or --crash-report to the command line.

trans-unit.source: Requests of type '{0}' is not supported
trans-unit.target: 不支援類型 '{0}' 的要求
